zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen於大約1203年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森時，她的父親Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg34歲，母親Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten24歲。她和Graf Otto II von Ravensburg至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1261年享年59歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen was born about 1203, in Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, Germany, her father, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, was 34 and her mother, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, was 24. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Graf Otto II von Ravensburg. She died in 1261, at the age of 59.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Graf Otto II von Ravensburg. Elle est décédée en 1261, à l’âge de 59 ans.

Sie hatte mit Graf Otto II von Ravensburg mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1261 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen è nata il circa 1203 nel Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania, sua padre, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Graf Otto II von Ravensburg. Morì nel 1261, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen(이)가 대략 1203년 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그 아트 윌데쇼센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Graf Otto II von Ravensburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen родилась около 1203 г. в местности амт уаилдешаусен, фристаат олденбург, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Graf Otto II von Ravensburg. Она умерла в 1261 г. в возрасте 59 лет.
